# The Meridian

> A private archive of antiques and historical objects, curated by Yulan Galagoda.

## About

The Meridian is a personal collection of rare and historically significant objects
spanning 1590 to the present. Each piece is documented with provenance, condition
notes, origin country, era classification, and curatorial commentary.

The archive is built and maintained as a static website backed by a private Notion
database. It is not a shop — nothing is for sale. It is a record.

## Collection

The collection currently holds objects across multiple categories including
antique maps, scientific instruments, historical documents, and ephemera.
Objects can be browsed, filtered by era, origin, condition, category, and tag,
or explored individually with full detail and gallery images.

- Full catalogue: https://meridian.yulan.me/collection
- Browse by category: https://meridian.yulan.me/categories
- About the archive: https://meridian.yulan.me/about

## Curator

Yulan Galagoda — collector, designer.

## Contact

https://yulan.me
